title: scutellaria tanakae
intro: Scutellaria tanakae, also known as Japanese skullcap or Tanakae, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family native to Japan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria tanakae include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from headaches and menstrual cramps. Scutellaria tanakae can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
